metadata.description: Official Cursor plugin marketplace: developer tools, framework rules, MCP integrations, and agent skills

plugins.name: teaching
plugins.description: Skill mapping, practice plans, and learning retrospectives.

plugins.name: continual-learning
plugins.description: Learns from your transcripts: promote stable preferences and workspace facts into AGENTS.md as plain bullets so every session starts aligned with how you work.

plugins.name: cursor-team-kit
plugins.description: Cursor’s internal shipping playbook as skills—triage CI, fix failures, open and refresh PRs, resolve merge conflicts, run smoke and compile checks, clean noisy diffs, and summarize what landed.

plugins.name: create-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffold marketplace-ready Cursor plugins—folder layout, manifests, optional skills and MCP—and run quality checks before you publish.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Iterative self-referential AI loops using the Ralph Wiggum technique.

plugins.name: agent-compatibility
plugins.description: CLI-backed audits of repo reality—verify install scripts, CI, and docs match what actually runs so agents (and humans) get a trustworthy quick start.

plugins.name: cli-for-agent
plugins.description: CLI design patterns for automation: non-interactive flags, layered --help with examples, stdin pipelines, clear errors, idempotency, and dry-run so agents never stall on prompts.
